_comment: Cross-chain oracle quorum pubkey set for omnibus-testnet. ≥3 distinct sigs from these compressed secp256k1 pubkeys are required to record a foreign-chain anchor via oracle_recordHeader. Deterministic derivation: sk_i = sha256('OMNIBUS_TESTNET_ORACLE_QUORUM_v1\n' + label_i) where label_i ∈ {validator-1..4}. Compressed pubkeys are 33-byte (0x02/0x03 prefix + 32-byte X coord), hex-encoded. Mainnet MUST replace with pubkeys from a hardened genesis ceremony.
